creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
(In reply to Craig Leres from comment #4)

Please, don't.

I found the problem! Port devel/autogen which I use often with other GNU autotools, is installed a while on my platforms and a relic, lang/guile referred to lang/guile2. I just followed a hunch on the errors shown below. Replacing lang/guile2 by lang/guile (which seems to be in fact guile4) and rebuilding the port in question, devel/xtensa-esp32-elf, finished without complains.

Thank you for your help and suggestions.
